zh.Staffort, Karlsruhe, Baden Wurttemberg,: 德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 卡爾茲盧斯圖斯塔福特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Catharina Maria Zeiter於1658年出生在德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 卡爾茲盧斯圖斯塔福特時，她的父親Jacob Zeiter45歲，母親Martha Zeiter46歲。她於1679年3月4日與Hanß Jost Stober在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1692年1月31日在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Catharina Maria Zeiter于1658年出生在德国巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 卡爾茲盧斯圖斯塔福特时，她的父亲Jacob Zeiter45岁，母亲Martha Zeiter46岁。她于1679年3月4日与Hanß Jost Stober在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1692年1月31日在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Zeiter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

nameMeanings.name: Catharina
meanings: English: An English form of Catharine.

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Catharina Maria Zeiter was born in 1658, in Staffort, Stutensee, Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, her father, Jacob Zeiter, was 45 and her mother, Martha Zeiter, was 46. She married Hanß Jost Stober on 4 March 1679, in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 31 January 1692, in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Catharina Maria Zeiter est née en 1658, à Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Jacob Zeiter, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Martha Zeiter, avait 46 ans. Elle a épousé Hanß Jost Stober le 4 mars 1679, à Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 31 janvier 1692, à Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Catharina Maria Zeiter 1658 in Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jacob Zeiter 45 und ihre Mutter Martha Zeiter 46. Sie hat am 4. März 1679 in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden Hanß Jost Stober geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. Januar 1692 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden.

Lei sposato Hanß Jost Stober il 4 marzo 1679, nel Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 31 gennaio 1692, nel Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Catharina Maria Zeiterが1658年にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグランドクレイス カルルスルヘストゥテンセスタフォートで生まれた時，父Jacob Zeiterは45歳，母Martha Zeiterは46歳であった。1679年3月4日にバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘスタフォートでHanß Jost Stoberと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1692年1月31日にバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘスタフォートで34歳で死去した。

ko.Staffort, Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg,: 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 칼스루헤 스투텐시 스태포트
ko.Staffort, Karlsruhe, Baden Wurttemberg,: 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 칼스루헤 스투텐시 스태포트
ko.lifeSummary: Anna Catharina Maria Zeiter(이)가 1658년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 칼스루헤 스투텐시 스태포트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jacob Zeiter(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Martha Zeiter(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 1679년 3월 4일 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 스태포트에서 Hanß Jost Stober(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1692년 1월 31일 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 스태포트에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Catharina Maria Zeiter nasceu em 1658, em Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Jacob Zeiter, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Martha Zeiter, tinha 46 anos. Ela casou-se com Hanß Jost Stober em 4 de março de 1679, em Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 31 de janeiro de 1692, em Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, com 34 anos.

ru.Staffort, Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg,: стаффорт, стутенси, ландкрис карлсрух, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия
ru.Staffort, Karlsruhe, Baden Wurttemberg,: стаффорт, стутенси, ландкрис карлсрух, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Catharina Maria Zeiter родилась в 1658 г. в местности стаффорт, стутенси, ландкрис карлсрух, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия, её отцу по имени Jacob Zeiter было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Martha Zeiter, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hanß Jost Stober 4 марта 1679 г. в местности стаффорт, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 31 января 1692 г. в местности стаффорт, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Catharina Maria Zeiter nació en 1658, en Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Jacob Zeiter, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Martha Zeiter, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Hanß Jost Stober el 4 de marzo de 1679, en Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 31 de enero de 1692, en Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, a la edad de 34 años.
